# Copilot Instructions

Follow `.saitec/AI_COLLABORATION.md` and `AGENTS.md` as the repository source of truth.
Follow `.saitec/Skills.md` for Git workflow guidance.

When assisting in this repository:
- Read existing code and docs before proposing changes.
- Read `.saitec/Skills.md` before handling branches, commits, pull requests, or result summaries.
- Prefer minimal, localized edits over broad rewrites.
- Do not invent APIs, commands, test results, or infrastructure facts.
- Explain verification status and remaining risks in every substantial change.
- Preserve established naming, layout, and branching conventions.
